name: Environmental Intake
description: Agricultural environmental impact intake. Evaluates an operation's environmental footprint across water quality, air quality, soil health, and biodiversity — identifying compliance obligations, voluntary improvement opportunities, and regulatory exposure. Produces an environmental impact profile with prioritized action recommendations.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Environmental Impact Report
types.description: Generated environmental impact report from intake session data.
